creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 171930
py-http-prompt-0.4.1.patch

- Update to 0.4.1
- portlint compliant
- poudriere tests ok FreeBSD 9.3|10.3|11 - i386|amd64

Release notes:

v.0.4.1
* Prevent app from exiting when Ctrl-C is pressed
* Fix bug: Error if command-line arguments have space characters
* Fix bug: Handle escaped characters in quoted strings

v.0.4.0
* Add feature: Persistent context
* Add feature: User configuration file
* Make default style 'solarized' to adapt white terminal
